# /task

> Detail the L4 task cards seeded by `/plan`. One markdown file per L4 task at `projects/{p}/d365-ce/features/{f}/tasks/{slug}.task.md`. Each task carries inputs, outputs, acceptance criteria, dependencies, and test coverage.

## Usage

```
/task [--feature <slug>] [--project <name>] [--task <slug>]
```

`--task <slug>` regenerates a single task; bare `/task` regenerates all that have changed since last run.

## Inputs

- `projects/{p}/d365-ce/features/{f}/plan.md` (gate `PLAN_CLARIFIED` APPROVED)
- `projects/{p}/d365-ce/tdd.md` (technical sections for the current feature)
- [templates/task.template.md](../../templates/task.template.md)

## Execution flow

1. Resolve feature; assert `PLAN_CLARIFIED` is APPROVED.
2. Enumerate L4 placeholders from `plan.md`. For each L4:
   - Estimate hours (target window 3-8h per [design/agents/alm.md § L1-L4](../../../design/agents/alm.md))
   - Map to TDD section + customisation inventory entry (entity / plugin / JS / PCF / Canvas / page / PA flow)
   - Author the task card per `templates/task.template.md`:
     - Title with object-type tag (e.g., `[plugin] Add CreateCase pre-create plugin`)
     - Description, acceptance criteria, inputs, expected outputs
     - Dependency list (upstream task slugs or cross-agent handoffs)
     - Test policy reference (`unit-test: required|optional|none`)
     - Estimated hours
3. Validate every task hours estimate fits 3-8h window; flag any outside the window for splitting.
4. Update `.workflow.json`: `currentStates` += `TASK_DRAFT`; `gate TASK_VALIDATED.status=PENDING`.

## Output

- `projects/{p}/d365-ce/features/{f}/tasks/{slug}.task.md` (one per L4)
- `.workflow.json` updated
